executives.name: Nadav Zafrir
executives.background: Mr. Zafrir has served as Chairman of the Board since 2019. He is the co-founder and Managing Partner of Team8, a venture creation and venture capital fund. He previously served as the Commander of the Israel Defense Forces Unit 8200.

tenure_dates.title: CEO and Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Tal Payne
executives.background: Ms. Payne has served as a director since 2015. She is the Chief Financial and Operations Officer of Check Point Software Technologies Ltd.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Chief Operating Officer (COO)
